prestazioni: J35A 3.5L V6 engine (JDM-spec J35A4 or J35A7) forced induction via Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate, supporting 450+ WHP on E85 fuel with a custom Hondata K-Pro V4 ECU tune and 750cc ID1000 injectors

Full bolt-on K-Tuned J35A performance package including K-Tuned 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust with 200-cell catalytic converter, K-Tuned 70mm throttle body, and K-Tuned high-flow intake manifold with port-matched runners for optimized airflow

Full suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (Honda Avancier-specific valving), Whiteline 24mm front and 22mm rear adjustable sway bars, and Cusco Type RS 3-way adjustable pillowball upper mounts for precise camber and caster tuning
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works Honda Avancier widebody kit with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and extended rocker panels, paired with custom 3M Matte Gunmetal wrap and JDM-spec Honda Avancier RS grille in gloss black

Seibon Carbon fiber hood with dual functional vents and integrated carbon fiber tow hooks, matched with a custom carbon fiber rear diffuser from Varis Japan and a 3-piece carbon fiber rear spoiler from Do-Luck

Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +25 front and 19x11.5 +35 rear wheels with 245/35/19 and 275/30/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with DBA 5000 Series two-piece rotors and AP Racing CP9660 calipers with custom stainless steel braided lines
